_comment: Phase B (verification-suite v3.3.0) MCP server registry. bd-mcp (J29) is the Beads task-tracker surface; code-graph-mcp (verification-suite Phase B) is the tree-sitter + SQLite code-graph server. code-graph replaces code-context-mcp, which was removed in 3.3.0 — the stable surface (code_search / code_context / code_index_health) is byte-compatible on inputs and on the documented output fields, and the impact-analysis tools (symbol_callers / impact_of / dead_code / dependency_path) are new with this server. The _phase7_codebase_graph_target placeholder is gone now that it is filled. Variable form is `${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}` because Claude Code sets CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR in the spawned MCP server's environment, not in its own — so a bare `${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}` in this project-scoped .mcp.json is unresolved at substitution time and produces an MCP-diagnostics warning. The `:-` default form is the documented fix (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp); .claude-plugin/plugin.json keeps the bare `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` form because the plugin scope substitutes those variables directly.
